title: Drev'starn Department of Criminal Discouragement
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Drev'starn Department of Criminal Discouragement''' was the name of the local police in the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] city of [[Drev'starn]]. Officers and investigators of this department wore green and yellow uniforms.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
